The patterns are already there—you just have to look!
Invest in what you know—and that applies to EVERYTHING in life!
Behind every data point is a story. Find the story!
Know what you're looking at, and know WHY it matters!
Walk through your own life like a researcher—you'll find more insights than any analyst!
Can you explain this pattern to a fifth grader? If not, dig deeper!
The best insight might be the one hiding in plain sight!
In this business, if you're right six times out of ten, you're doing great!
Everyone has the brainpower to find patterns. If you made it through fifth-grade math, you can do it!
Never act on any insight you can't illustrate with a crayon!
Cross-pollinate! The best insights come from connecting unrelated data!
Leading indicators win. Find what PREDICTS, not just what HAPPENED.
The data doesn't judge—it reveals. Your job is to listen!
One keystone habit changes everything. Find it!
Correlation isn't causation—but it's a clue worth following!
The numbers aren't the insight. The STORY behind the numbers is the insight!
Sleep, spending, habits, goals—it's all connected. THAT'S where the magic is!
Don't fix symptoms. Find the root cause. The data will tell you!
Most people track the wrong things. Find the leading indicator!
Patterns are everywhere. The problem isn't that they're hidden—it's that we're not looking!
